properties.description: Identifier for users in the Cornerstone talent system
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should not be duplicated within the same context
properties.business_description: A unique identifier assigned to each user within the Cornerstone talent performance system, used to track user-related data.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate format to ensure it is a valid string
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by user status, Filter by division

properties.description: The name of the user as registered in the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be unique within the context of the userId
properties.business_description: This column represents the username of employees within the Cornerstone talent management system, used for identification and login purposes.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for duplicates against userId, Validate format to ensure it meets username standards
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userStatus, Filter by division

properties.description: The complete name of the user, including first and last names.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should not contain special characters
properties.business_description: Represents the full name of the employee as recorded in the system, used for identification and reporting purposes.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for leading or trailing spaces, Validate format to ensure it contains at least a first and last name
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by user status, Filter by division

properties.description: Column representing the email address of the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Must follow standard email format
properties.business_description: Email address used for communication and notifications related to employee performance and talent management.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate email format, Check for duplicates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by user status, Filter by division

properties.description: Identifier for the manager of the user, represented as a string.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user does not have a manager, Should reference a valid userId in the User_csod table if present
properties.business_description: This column represents the unique identifier for the manager associated with a user in the Cornerstone talent data.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid userId references if managerId is not null, Ensure no invalid characters are present in the managerId
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by managerId to analyze users under specific managers, Filter by userStatus to see active/inactive users under a manager

properties.description: The name of the manager associated with the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user does not have a manager, Should reflect the current manager's name
properties.business_description: This column represents the name of the manager for each employee, which is essential for understanding reporting structures within the organization.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure names are properly formatted (e.g., no numbers or special characters), Check for consistency with managerId column
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific manager names, Filter by user status to see active/inactive employees under a manager

properties.description: Column representing the job position of the user within the organization.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user is not assigned a position, Should accurately reflect the user's current job title
properties.business_description: The specific role or title held by the employee, which is relevant for performance evaluations and organizational structure.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure consistency in naming conventions, Validate against a predefined list of valid positions if available
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific positions, Filter by department or division

properties.description: Column representing the division within the organization to which the user belongs.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should reflect the current division of the employee
properties.business_description: This column indicates the specific division of the company that the employee is associated with, which can be used for organizational analysis and reporting.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against known divisions, Check for consistency in naming conventions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific division, Filter by user status within division
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by division, GROUP BY division

properties.description: Column representing the geographical location of the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should contain valid location names
properties.business_description: This column indicates the physical or geographical location associated with the user, which can be used for reporting and analysis of user distribution across different regions.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for empty values, Validate against a list of known locations
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific location, Filter by user status and location
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by location, GROUP BY location

properties.description: Indicates the current status of the user within the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Values may include 'Active', 'Inactive', 'On Leave'
properties.business_description: This column represents whether a user is active, inactive, or on leave, which is crucial for understanding user engagement and performance tracking.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are within the defined set of statuses, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Active users, Filter by Inactive users
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by userStatus, PERCENTAGE of users by status

properties.description: The date when the user last logged into the system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user has never logged in, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column represents the most recent date that a user accessed their account, which can be used to track user engagement and activity levels.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid date format, Ensure that if a date is present, it is not in the future
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific date ranges, Filter by user status to see active vs inactive users
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of users who logged in within a specific timeframe, MAX of last login dates to find the most recent activity

properties.description: The date when the user started in the organization, represented as a string in date format.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the start date is not available, Should follow a valid date format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD) if provided
properties.business_description: Indicates the commencement date of an employee's tenure within the organization, which is crucial for performance evaluations and tenure-related analyses.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for logical consistency with userStatus (e.g., startDate should not be after lastLogindate)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter users by start date range, Filter by userStatus to analyze active vs. inactive users
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of users by start date, Average tenure calculation based on start date

properties.description: This table contains essential employee information related to talent management, including user details, managerial hierarchy, and employment status.
properties.business_purpose: The User_csod table serves as a foundational source for managing employee performance data, enabling effective talent management and decision-making within the organization.
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter users by userStatus for active/inactive reporting", "Filter by division and position for organizational analytics", "Join with PerformanceData_csod to track performance metrics", "Filter by managerId to build org hierarchy", "Group by division and position for talent analytics", "Filter by startDate for tenure analysis", "Filter by lastLoginDate to find inactive users"]
properties.useCases: ["Talent Management: Track employee profiles and organizational structure", "Performance Analytics: Join with PerformanceData_csod to analyze employee performance", "Org Hierarchy: Build organizational structure using managerId relationships", "Talent Reporting: Generate reports by division, position, and status", "User Engagement: Track user activity and tenure", "Talent Planning: Analyze workforce distribution by division and position", "User Discovery: Search and filter users for talent management"]
properties.data_lineage: Data is sourced from Cornerstone's talent management system, populated through regular updates from HR systems and user activity logs.
properties.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 5 years to comply with organizational policies and legal requirements.
